title: Animal Craftin!
description: A simple mod that adds animal crossing characters into Minecraft with full dialogue trees
body:
A simple mod that adds animal crossing characters into Minecraft with full dialogue trees

WARNING!!! THIS MOD IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT AND THERE WILL PROBABLY BE BUGS, BE WARNED!!!


FEATURES:
Fully fledged out dialouge trees with randomized outcomes!![Kid Cat Text](https://i.imgur.com/U7vWl4G.gif)
Multiple Npcs with different text![bothy](https://i.imgur.com/lVI2ESs.gif)
A similar but different shop system in Tom Nook with a new currency, Bells!![Toms storeee](https://i.imgur.com/nULcWpf.gif)
And finally, NEW STRUCTURES!![yownhall](https://i.imgur.com/t2cFI8P.gif)
